name: to_datetime_ordering_lt
note: toDateTime instant ordering: Lt(toDateTime(toString(person.properties.signup_date)), toDateTime("2026-01-01 00:00:00")). expected_result is the ClickHouse/instant-ordering answer the Rust VM matches; the Python/TS reference VMs cannot order Hog temporals, so this is a Rust-vs-ClickHouse oracle, not a cross-runtime one. See the module-level provenance caveat.
